mentions.note: Down considerably; packaged food sector weakness.
Caller Mike question: Consumer staple at multi-year lows; 6.67% yield doesn't stop decline. Smucker (SJM) reported good quarter, got crushed. No reason to recommend; pass.
Food industry needs M&A to reignite growth; organic growth stalled, pricing and pet food alone insufficient; consolidation required.
Most reliable stock now sporting 7.2% yield; unsustainable dividend yield signals market skepticism of sustainability.
